project.name: ReviewMind AI
project.description: A persistent, memory-powered code review agent for software engineering teams. Eliminates repetitive convention enforcement by building a living memory of team coding standards, past review feedback, architectural decisions, and recurring mistakes — applied automatically on every new review.

architecture.layer: Stores and retrieves team conventions, recurring mistakes per contributor, architectural decisions, and approved exceptions using the hindsight-client Python SDK.
Sequences the review workflow: code ingestion, context retrieval, prompt construction, LLM analysis, error handling, output formatting, and memory update.
Generates structured code reviews using function calling. Implements retry logic with text-only fallback on failure.
Async API server exposing POST /review and POST /inject-memory endpoints with startup environment validation.
5-step demo UI with memory panel, code input, review output, and side-by-side comparison view.
Detects mutable default arguments, missing try/except in async functions, and direct ORM queries in route handlers.

files.file: FastAPI application. Defines POST /review and POST /inject-memory routes. Validates all required environment variables at startup via lifespan handler. Creates Hindsight memory bank on startup.
7-stage CascadeFlow review pipeline. Orchestrates parse_code, query_memory, prompt construction, Groq LLM call, response validation, output formatting, and memory update.
Hindsight Python SDK wrapper. Provides async write_memory and query_memory functions using aretain and arecall. Never raises to caller — all errors return safe defaults.
Groq SDK wrapper with retry and fallback logic. Attempts function calling twice, then falls back to text-only mode. Returns GroqError on all failures without raising.
libcst-based code parser. Detects mutable default args, async functions missing try/except, and direct ORM usage. Falls back to regex if libcst parsing fails.
Pydantic schemas: ReviewRequest, MemoryEntryInput, MemoryEntry, ReviewOutput, ReviewResponse, InjectRequest, InjectResponse.

Synthetic PR history data for demo injection. Contains 4 entries: Team Convention (mutable-default-arg), Recurring Mistake (missing-try-except-async), Architectural Decision (repository-layer), Approved Exception (legacy-auth-direct-query).
Python dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, groq, libcst, pydantic, python-dotenv, pytest, pytest-asyncio, hypothesis, hindsight-client.

api.endpoint: Accepts ReviewRequest (code, contributor, file_path). Runs the 7-stage pipeline. Returns ReviewResponse with review output, memory_mode, and recalled_entries.
Accepts InjectRequest (list of MemoryEntryInput). Bulk-writes entries to Hindsight. Returns InjectResponse with written, failed, and errors counts.
Returns status ok. Used for health checks.

files.file: Main application component. Manages 5-step demo scenario state. Handles review submissions, memory injection, and step transitions.
Axios client. Exports submitReview and injectMemory functions. Uses VITE_API_URL environment variable for backend base URL.
TypeScript interfaces mirroring backend Pydantic schemas: MemoryCategory, MemoryMode, MemoryEntry, ReviewOutput, ReviewResponse, InjectResponse.
Renders 5-step progress indicator. Highlights active step, marks completed steps with checkmark.
Displays WITH MEMORY (green) or WITHOUT MEMORY (grey) badge based on memory_mode.
Live view of Hindsight memory entries. Shows animated loading state during injection. Renders category badges and contributor tags.
Monospace textarea for code input. Supports read-only mode for review steps.
Renders structured review with 4 sections: Critical Issues, Team Convention Violations, Contributor-Specific Patterns, Positive Signals. Includes 2-sentence summary and MemoryBadge.
Triggers POST /inject-memory with synthetic PR history. Shows loading animation. Displays retry option on partial failure.
Side-by-side layout showing without-memory and with-memory reviews at Step 5.

demoFlow.step: Display scenario context. Show code input pre-loaded with PR sample. Empty memory panel.
Submit code without memory. Show generic review labeled WITHOUT MEMORY.
Load PR history into Hindsight with animated progress. Memory panel populates.
Submit identical code with memory loaded. Show context-aware review labeled WITH MEMORY.
Side-by-side comparison of both reviews showing the quality delta.

memoryCategories.category: Project-wide coding rules established during reviews.
Design patterns, module boundaries, and approved exceptions.
Cases where the standard rule was explicitly waived.
Good practices to reinforce in feedback.

prHistory.pr: Async route handler missing try/except around await calls.
All DB calls must go through repository layer. Exception for legacy auth module.
Same async error-handling gap reappeared. Escalated by Priya Nair.

syntheticData.sampleCode:
async def get_user_orders(user_id: int, filters=[]): result = await db.query(Order).filter(Order.user_id == user_id).all() return result
Mutable default argument (filters=[]) Missing try/except around await call Direct ORM query in route handler

environment.variable: Backend base URL for production deployment
